creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

my poudriere is building latest ports, will have 4.12 soon, will report back if there are any improvements.

I have installed ADS following instruction on their site, by adding "http://directory.apache.org/studio/update/". Is there a way to install newer version somehow?

Also, it seems this is not related just to FreeBSD port:

https://issues.apache.org/jira/projects/DIRSTUDIO/issues/DIRSTUDIO-1195

Still, if someone have an advice how to get Apache Directory Studio working with currently supported FreeBSD versions and ports, please let me know.

Thanks,
